title: New Republic Reference Service
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''New Republic Reference Service''' was an information bureau present within the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] where data was stored on a wide variety of subjects.

During the [[Black Fleet Crisis]], [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] performed a search with the reference service on the terms "[[Fallanassi/Legends|Fallanassi]]" and "[[White Current/Legends|White Current]]" and turned up no results.

==Appearances==
*''[[Shield of Lies]]'' {{1stm}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
